issues.description: Action type 'Rest' is incorrect. The effect prevents opponent from activating Blockers, not resting them. Should use a blocking/prevention mechanic or condition-based approach. 'Rest' does not match the card text which states 'cannot activate'.
Missing duration specification. The effect applies 'during this battle' only, which should be duration:'DuringThisBattle' or similar battle-scoped duration, not permanent.
Target incorrectly specified as generic opponent characters. Should target specifically [Blocker] type characters with 2000 or less power (needs type condition).

suggestedDsl.effectText: [When Attacking] Your opponent cannot activate a [Blocker] Character that has 2000 or less power during this battle.
